mapper.sql: CASE WHEN io.io_reason = '폐기' THEN 'HIGH' WHEN TRUNC(l.lot_exp) - TRUNC(io.io_date) <= 0 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN TRUNC(l.lot_exp) - TRUNC(io.io_date) <= 15 THEN 'WARNING' WHEN (s.stock_reserve_qty / NULLIF(s.stock_prev_qty, 0)) * 100 >= 30 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'LOW' END
FROM io io JOIN lot l ON io.io_lot = l.lot_id JOIN item i ON l.lot_item = i.item_id LEFT JOIN stock s ON s.stock_item = i.item_id
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(io_qty), 0) AS totalIoQty, NVL(SUM(lot_qty), 0) AS totalLotQty, NVL(SUM(lot_fqty), 0) AS totalLotFqty,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'LOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS lowCount,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'WARNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS warningCount,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN risk_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS highCount,
NVL(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN risk_level = 'WARNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS warningRate,
NVL(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN risk_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS highRate
FROM ( SELECT NVL(io.io_qty, 0) AS io_qty, NVL(l.lot_qty, 0) AS lot_qty, NVL(l.lot_fqty, 0) AS lot_fqty, AS risk_level
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, base_data.* FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(io.io_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "ioDate", io.io_type AS "ioType", io.io_reason AS "ioReason",
l.lot_id AS "lotId", i.item_id AS "itemId", i.item_name AS "itemName",
NVL(io.io_qty, 0) AS "ioQty", NVL(l.lot_qty, 0) AS "lotQty", NVL(l.lot_fqty, 0) AS "lotFqty",
NVL(s.stock_prev_qty, 0) AS "stockPrevQty", NVL(s.stock_avail_qty, 0) AS "stockAvailQty", NVL(s.stock_reserve_qty, 0) AS "stockReserveQty",
NVL(ROUND( (s.stock_reserve_qty / NULLIF(s.stock_prev_qty, 0)) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS "reserveRate",
AS "riskLevel"
FROM io io JOIN lot l ON io.io_lot = l.lot_id JOIN item i ON l.lot_item = i.item_id LEFT JOIN stock s ON s.stock_item = i.item_id
WHERE io.io_usage = 'Y'
AND io.io_date >= TO_DATE(#{search.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND io.io_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)), -6)
AND io.io_date < TO_DATE(#{search.endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND (
) = #{search.riskLevel}
AND io.io_type = #{search.ioType}
AND io.io_reason = #{search.ioReason}
AND ( UPPER(io.io_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(l.lot_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(i.item_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY io.io_date DESC, io.io_id DESC ) base_data WHERE ROWNUM <= #{page.endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{page.startRow}

SELECT risk_level AS "riskLevel", COUNT(*) AS "riskCount" FROM ( SELECT AS risk_level
) GROUP BY risk_level ORDER BY CASE risk_level WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'WARNING' THEN 2 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NVL(io.io_qty, 0) AS "ioQty", NVL(l.lot_qty, 0) AS "lotQty", NVL(l.lot_fqty, 0) AS "lotFqty",
NVL(i.item_type, 0) AS "itemType", NVL(i.item_unit_price, 0) AS "itemUnitPrice",
TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(io.io_date, 'MM')) AS "ioMonth", TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(io.io_date, 'D')) AS "ioWeekday"
ORDER BY CASE WHEN io.io_reason = '폐기' THEN 1 WHEN TRUNC(l.lot_exp) - TRUNC(io.io_date) <= 0 THEN 1 WHEN TRUNC(l.lot_exp) - TRUNC(io.io_date) <= 15 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, io.io_date DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
